## Changelog

- [`1c6a10d`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/1c6a10d3c36e7fd9f55a61b56b22fddb6bf188a0) Add support for UDP proxying ( [#187](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/pull/187))
- [`a8ead80`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/a8ead80ee696cd1445887f9f4c5f4e81a3e3a851) Bump github.com/landlock-lsm/go-landlock ( [#196](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/pull/196))
- [`a464c61`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/a464c61dbdff775e69093353276dc0ac5db79a37) Bump golang.org/x/crypto from 0.31.0 to 0.45.0 ( [#197](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/pull/197))
- [`7de271d`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/7de271ddece3f1b53bc88ba2a83a293c021cdfd8) Pass linter
- [`04030e8`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/04030e8714f4d776f7bc77ba55241f20f6aeb12c) Support for HTTPS ( [#133](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/pull/133))
- [`0470c14`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/0470c142dd50248f4717e885109c6699387b7f38) Update Go base image to version 1.26
- [`0567d6e`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/0567d6ebde4580337d9a3a4fd644c34a6021c4f8) Update README with UDPProxyTunnel and Resolve details
- [`053fdd2`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/053fdd27c9e625f6363a6db04d3e444615405416) Update container workflow to use ubuntu-latest
- [`aaf2379`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/aaf23797d1ec83456e0c5cbf6c067803fc3ec576) Update copyright year and owner in LICENSE file
- [`96110d2`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/96110d237264fd1124fb97e48b58d1742d79d5c3) build: Update golangci-lint-action to v9.2.0.
- [`4c23415`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/4c23415fd04f9b7154869d491eed97669eef0d50) ci: Update Go version to 1.26 in all workflows and trigger releases on push tags.
- [`bceb167`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/bceb167ce7d2c94c403f36d566cc43ec04f34d9a) feat(resolve): add IP resolve strategy and format code ( [#181](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/pull/181))
- [`e76e370`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/e76e3701a80639e2bb3e0ca1336043fe53d7424a) fix: Fix STDIOTunnel ( [#190](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/pull/190))
- [`503d7b6`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/503d7b66b6bd19f2b2ada1568d95037c36d450aa) fix: allow access to /dev/null

## Changelog

- [`31e6afd`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/31e6afd75dc25d2359daf3507af71de59db8c4e2) Allow to use wireproxy as endpoint ( [#74](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/pull/74))
- [`af97322`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/af973227e99146024285bb1498fcd0ed78f95ce3) Bump golang.org/x/crypto from 0.14.0 to 0.17.0 ( [#98](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/pull/98))
- [`0f4d79d`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/0f4d79dea884855ccb378067e80e7c110b1f269b) Fix build on go 1.21 by updating wireguard-go ( [#91](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/pull/91))
- [`aa20776`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/aa207764b2a68191c5e6c7f13da69bd7cff40c09) Implement STDIOTunnel ( [#70](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/pull/70))
- [`05c8493`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/05c8493981ced363e079eb236c177ea2a85b91bf) Provide an example systemd service file ( [#77](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/pull/77))
- [`d1a455e`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/d1a455e87d3fd76d522a3cd85a362578637155eb) Remove interface address subnet length check ( [#86](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/pull/86))
- [`edf6325`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/edf63253df04a2e46a2c614406952847f1f67217) Update README with Firefox VPN tabs instructions ( [#73](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/pull/73))
- [`d2f7768`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/d2f7768c51a72b75b7eb1875bb1b887ce5277591) Update dependencies ( [#79](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/pull/79))
- [`5f76f77`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/5f76f777d569e33869bd51219a8a57ae10a595cc) Use io.Copy instead of io.CopyBuffer ( [#85](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/pull/85))
- [`a2d7aec`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/a2d7aecb6fc6e6451d90bee8e53fff8a99d614d4) fix: improvements in memory consumption ( [#100](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/pull/100))

## Changelog

- [`0e63331`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/0e6333194a23a0d98b2ad2543083fb79478e2292) support go 1.19

## Note to packagers

Please specify the package version when building wireproxy via setting `ldflags` to `"-X 'main.version=${version}'"`.

## Changelog

- [`02a56ca`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/02a56cad13685c6992ea935600914fb27c8239d8) Allow multiple peers, tunnels, and proxies
- [`be8865e`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/be8865eeb1cdf9eddbfebd9fa4a32c42cb2cec01) Redo Dockerfile
- [`b887606`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/b887606007fd90955d2e9647e5411e5bd0497bdf) add print version flag
- [`bc77be0`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/bc77be08cc279dabe94f491ec79e8c2c13b020c5) bump version to 1.0.4
- [`6e3c3a2`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/6e3c3a25f36f22c18ab41b9752ed0ff4d829ba9e) update go version to 1.18
- [`e102c35`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/e102c35f8577929c573e6e4358f9ddf6e9ca521c) update wireguard dependency and fix linter

[v1.0.3](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/tree/v1.0.3)

[`f637b0f`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/commit/f637b0f916ab9480e171a59818941139201c2246)

This commit was signed with the committer’s **verified signature**.


Verified
on Nov 5, 2024, 08:46 PM

[Learn about vigilant mode](https://docs.github.com/github/authenticating-to-github/displaying-verification-statuses-for-all-of-your-commits).


## What's Changed

- Further sandboxing in OpenBSD using `unveil` to limit exec permission
- Resolve the static tunnel target for every new connection

**Full Changelog**: [`v1.0.2...v1.0.3`](https://github.com/windtf/wireproxy/compare/v1.0.2...v1.0.3)
